sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_agg (number UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY number;
SELECT finalizeAggregation(countState(number)) AS total_count FROM test_agg;
SELECT finalizeAggregation(sumState(number)) AS total_sum FROM test_agg;
SELECT number, finalizeAggregation(countState(number)) OVER (PARTITION BY number) AS count_per_number FROM test_agg;
